meaning: v.(使)局部化,(使)地方化,停留在一地方
examples: Follow these steps to localize the form to different locales.
It may seem strange but the more we globalize, the more we localize.
Now you can localize menus, buttons, and messages in a faster, simpler way.
Even Dunkin' Donuts, a chain specializing in one type of food, does its best to localize its menu.
Snyder, by contrast, wants to localize the Holocaust, to make it part of a geographic and spatial history.
